## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Prompt pack update
- [ ] Chore

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are focused and reviewable
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] Prompt pack updated if needed
- [ ] CI passes
- [ ] No private local files included
